authority: read-only live-state comparison plus writes confined to disposable C:/tmp roots; no authority for real CC Switch, shared Agent Home, Hook, consumer configuration, Git, or remote mutation

toolchain.toolchainChange: Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 Build Tools VCTools workload installed under prior owner authorization to supply the missing MSVC linker

upstreamWindowsIsolationFinding.rootCause: config::get_home_dir honored CC_SWITCH_TEST_HOME, while services::skill still used dirs::home_dir directly for Agent, lock, unified SSOT, application Skill, and migration paths
upstreamWindowsIsolationFinding.risk: the stock Windows Skill test suite was not a complete disposable-home proof and could read real application Skill directories

diagnosticIsolationPatch.change: route the five direct services::skill home lookups through config::get_home_dir

covered: import without rewriting the selected application directory
backup restore to SSOT and selected application
migration snapshot precedence over multi-source inference

repositoryOwnedDisposableContractTest.location: temporary extracted CC Switch source only
assertions: a disabled source repository persists in the isolated database
the same source can be enabled without changing its identity
a same-directory candidate from another repository fails with SKILL_DIRECTORY_CONFLICT
the collision fails before any repository download or Skill execution
the error retains uninstallFirst as an explicit resolution boundary

liveStateNonMutationEvidence.databaseIsolationProof: all dynamic tests initialized their database below the disposable CC_SWITCH_TEST_HOME

verifiedClaims: CC Switch can persist source repositories and their enabled state
CC Switch rejects same-directory cross-source collisions before download
CC Switch backup, restore, selective projection, and migration-snapshot contracts pass under a corrected disposable-home boundary
unverifiedOrOpenClaims: stock v3.17.0 Windows tests are fully isolated without the diagnostic patch
a public GitHub source-backed update succeeds and rolls back in a real canary
real CC Switch GUI registration, relinking, replacement, or restore
migration of any of the 43 active projections
current live database immutability by whole-file digest
nextGate: Keep acceptance partial. The loopback source-update fixture now proves success and manual recovery while confirming that update_skill is not atomic. A real one-Skill canary still requires separate authorization, consistent database and Skill backups, exact before/after hashes, previewed ownership transition, and rehearsed failure recovery.
nonActions: no real CC Switch database, settings, source, Skill, link, backup, or restore write
no shared Agent Home, Codex configuration, Hook, MCP, Plugin, or App mutation
no upstream issue or pull request
no cross-repository write, commit, or push
